title: 跟随 AI 学徒 Jianzuo 深度技能阶段的一天
titleEn: Follow AI Apprentice Jianzuo Through a Day in the Deep-Skilling Phase of AIAP
summary: 展示 AI Singapore 的 AI 学徒计划（AIAP）深度技能阶段，通过结构化培训和指导导师制，让学员掌握应用 AI 知识和 AI 工程能力。
summaryEn: Showcases AI Singapore's AI Apprenticeship Programme (AIAP) Deep-Skilling Phase, where apprentices gain applied AI knowledge and core AI Engineering capabilities through structured training and guided mentorship.
speaker: AI Singapore
speakerTitle: AI 研究与人才培养机构
